chapter_title.en: Chapter 175 – The going out of the women to the two Eids

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/381)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/381)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ خُرُوجِ النِّسَاءِ فِي الْعِيدَيْنِ وَ الْجُمُعَةِ فَقَالَ لَا إِلَّا امْرَأَةٌ مُسِنَّةٌ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from Muhammad Bin Ali, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the going out of the women during the two Eids, and the Friday, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, except for an elderly woman’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from Muhammad ibn Ali from Yunus ibn Ya’qub who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about women going out for ‘Id and Friday Salat (prayer). He (the Imam) said, ‘No, except old women.’” (Consult Fatwah about this hadith)
